name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Met in freshman year of university. She's doing her PhD in neuroscience now. We used to study together every weekend.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: My first manager at the tech company. Taught me everything about clean code and system design. Still grab coffee monthly.

name: Priya Nair
bio: We grew up on the same street. She moved to Canada three years ago but we try to catch up every two weeks over video call.

name: Daniel Kim
bio: Gym buddy from college. We used to train together 4 days a week. He started his own fitness business last year.

name: Sofia Martinez
bio: Colleague turned close friend. We worked on the same product team for 2 years. She recently switched to UX design full time.

name: Tariq Hassan
bio: Family friend since childhood. Our families used to go on road trips together. He's now an architect based in Dubai.

name: Emily Chen
bio: Met at a local book club two years ago. We share the same taste in fiction and philosophy. Monthly meetups at the local cafe.

name: James Okafor
bio: Travel buddy from a backpacking trip across Southeast Asia. We promised to do another trip this year. Haven't talked in a while.
